title: The Big Bang Of AI Just Happened: Cosmos 3
summary: NVIDIA launched Cosmos 3, a world model for physical AI that trains on video, audio, text, and action data to enable robots to understand and plan in real-world environments. Cosmos 3 forms part of a full AI stack including Vera agent CPU and Isaac GR00T humanoid robot.
